task: Review assigned loads, delivery details, and route information in the mobile driver app before leaving the yard.
frequency: at the start of each run
tool_today: Driver mobile app, scheduler map, staging notes
decision_content: Decide whether the run sequence is workable or whether missing address, access, or load details need dispatch escalation first.

task: Complete the pre-trip truck inspection and log DVIR issues before driving the route.
tool_today: DVIR form or driver app, truck inspection checklist
decision_content: Judge whether a defect is safety-critical enough to ground the truck or can be repaired after the run.

task: Deliver equipment to the jobsite, capture the customer signature, and document delivery condition with photos.
tool_today: Driver mobile app, digital signature capture, mobile photos
decision_content: Confirm the site is ready, the handoff is correct, and any delivery condition notes are complete before the move is closed.

task: Pick up returned equipment and record condition, damage, or missing attachments before the return move is signed off.
tool_today: Driver mobile app, pickup ticket, timestamped photos
decision_content: Distinguish obvious damage or missing items from normal wear and decide what needs immediate escalation to the branch or shop.

task: Send real-time ETA, access, or delay updates when route conditions threaten the delivery promise.
frequency: as site or traffic conditions change
tool_today: Driver app status updates, phone/text, dispatch board
decision_content: Choose when a delay needs dispatch resequencing or customer communication instead of silent adjustment.

task: Record proof-of-delivery or collection digitally so branch and customer records stay current without paper manifests.
tool_today: Driver app, barcode scan, digital receipts
decision_content: Verify the right asset, receipt, and customer acknowledgement are attached before the stop syncs back to the rental system.

task: Flag damage evidence or missing attachments so the branch can pursue repair or damage recovery without a later dispute.
frequency: when anomalies are found during pickup or delivery
tool_today: Mobile photos, condition notes, phone to branch
decision_content: Judge whether the issue is routine wear or a billable exception that needs immediate evidence capture and escalation.
